name: mcp_server_bad
note: An over-exposed MCP server. It publishes the four needed operations plus a raw SQL tool and a secrets-listing resource the agents never need, leaves the sensitive operations ungated, mislabels the raw SQL tool as a read when arbitrary SQL is destructive, and raises its bulk export ceiling past the host output limit so a single call floods context. The same request set runs through the same boundary engine as the scoped server, and only this spec differs.

operations.name: search_docs
operations.description: Search the internal documentation corpus. Read.

operations.name: export_corpus
operations.description: Export the documentation corpus. Read, ceiling raised for large dumps.

operations.name: raw_sql_query
operations.description: Run an arbitrary SQL statement against the production database. Labeled read.

operations.name: list_secrets
operations.description: List the stored credentials and API keys for the project.
